title: beringeria hispanica
intro: Beringeria hispanica, also known as the Spanish chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Beringeria hispanica include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Beringeria hispanica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
